tagline: You can now ingest data from the NetSuite2.com data source programmatically using the Databricks API, the Databricks CLI, or a Databricks notebook.
what_it_does: You can now ingest data from the NetSuite2.com data source programmatically using the Databricks API, the Databricks CLI, or a Databricks notebook. Preview This feature is in Public Preview. Learn how to configure your NetSuite account for Databricks ingestion using token based authentication (TBA).
why_it_matters: After saving, NetSuite displays the Consumer Key and Consumer Secret.
plain_summary: You can now ingest data from the NetSuite2.com data source programmatically using the Databricks API, the Databricks CLI, or a Databricks notebook. Preview This feature is in Public Preview.
key_takeaway: You can now ingest data from the NetSuite2.com data source programmatically using the Databricks API, the Databricks CLI, or a Databricks notebook.
